description: BS_OS module registry. BS_OS reads this file to generate launcher entries.

modules.name: BS IME Assistant
modules.description: CAD / design workflow Chinese-English input switching assistant. Runs in background.

modules.name: BS CAD Bridge Check
modules.description: Checks local BS-CAD-Tools and BS-CAD-Standard paths before real AutoCAD loading integration.

modules.name: BS CAD Tools
modules.description: AutoCAD efficiency commands and CAD standard tools. Loads LISP / plugin commands into AutoCAD.

modules.name: BS CAD Standard
modules.description: CAD layer standard, template rules, text styles, dimension styles and CTB configuration.

modules.name: BS Project Manager
modules.description: Create and open standard project folders for design workflow.

modules.name: BS Design Copilot
modules.description: Context-aware floating assistant for CAD, rendering, material, modeling and design knowledge prompts.

modules.name: BS Max Assistant
modules.description: 3ds Max / Corona workflow assistant. Future module.
